scenarios.description: A new event references an artefact digest that does not match the prior chained digest for this run.
scenarios.title: Broken digest continuity

scenarios.description: Two distinct payloads attempt to reuse the same immutable event identifier for one run.
scenarios.title: Duplicate event id

scenarios.description: An export or pack assembly step cannot include all mandatory sections referenced by policy.
scenarios.title: Incomplete evidence pack

scenarios.description: Evaluation record fails schema validation or contradicts declared benchmark version.
scenarios.title: Invalid evaluation

scenarios.description: Policy mandates an approval event that is absent at promotion time.
scenarios.title: Missing approval

scenarios.description: Events omit required audit context such as actor identity, correlation id, or policy version binding.
scenarios.title: Missing audit context

scenarios.description: Required evidence types for the decision were never ingested for the run.
scenarios.title: Missing evidence

scenarios.description: Evidence references another tenant's artefact id or digest namespace.
scenarios.title: Tenant isolation spoofing
